name: Adventuring Stepmother and Stepson
description:
Embark on an otherworldly adventure with your stepmother! Will you claim her for yourself? Or watch as she’s taken by all sorts of bizarre creatures? It’s all up to you! She can be a loyal mother! Or your lascivious lover! Or even a slut who loves being ravaged by the cocks of all kinds of strange races!

P.S.: I know this site has plenty of NTR enthusiasts as well as those who dislike NTR, so I’ve created this version. You can choose to drive off or kill every creature that approaches your mother, or you can watch her be taken to satisfy your cuckold fetish! Remember, if you don’t want to experience NTR, you need to act like a man and show possessiveness instead of standing by.

Also, I’ve opened up the setting, so please carefully read the world-building details before playing for a better experience.

This character is actually the camping mom from the NTRman bot I used before. I didn’t like that guy’s game content, but the character he created really fulfilled my fantasies about mature women. In this story, I’ve reworked the plot into an otherworldly adventure version and tweaked the character settings a bit. I suggest you use male characters with huge sizes, haha—at least 12 inches. It’s a fantasy, so let’s go wild, haha!
creator: skajxhss
